'''Antoll Jellrek''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] who administered the [[Galov sector/Legends|Galov sector]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He was tall and pale and sported a forked beard.

==Biography==
Jellrek was ruthless and brutal, but gladly accepted tribute from the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lords]] of his [[Sector/Legends|sector]] in return for not mingling with their operations. He was involved in illegal [[Ryll/Legends|ryll]] and [[Slavery/Legends|slave trade]] and was rumored to have several slave girls in his private estate on [[Romar]]. Jellrek had a taste for both physical and psychological [[Torture/Legends|torture]], being especially merciless to enemies of the Empire such as the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]].<ref name="BQ" /> He was killed after [[Platt Okeefe/Legends|Platt Okeefe]] and [[Tru'eb Cholakk]] killed [[Quintik Kahr]] during their escape from slavery.<ref name="The Complete Star Encyclopedia">''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''</ref>
